author: seekerPrice
name: CUDA Port: Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + Tuned Hyperparameters
note: PyTorch/CUDA port of PR #1612 recipe. All new features opt-in via env vars (RECUR_LAYERS, PARALLEL_RESIDUAL, MATRIX_LR, MUON_MOMENTUM, QK_GAIN_INIT). Backwards compatible with upstream baseline. Awaiting H100 compute credits to validate.
technique_summary: Upstream train_gpt.py + depth recurrence + parallel residuals (L7+) + tuned hyperparameters (Muon 0.95, QK-Gain 4.0, Matrix LR 0.02). All opt-in.
